productDisplayName: Puma Men White Surge Casual Shoes
description: Style Notepuma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. This pair is great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.Product DescriptionRound toed Sports shoe with a fabric upper and synthetic overlaysPadded interiors with reinforced overlay and a pull loop at the heel collarForm stripes on one side, with symmetric designTPU outsole with an upraised and decoupled heel, has honeycomb nubs at the forefoot region and is arched at the midfootMaterial and CareMesh, rubber, syntheticDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
